← All our places  /  Nîmes  /  Garance
Nîmes

Garance

The blue of Nîmes, over two floors.
6guests
2bedrooms
1shower room
✓air conditioning
+ 1 photos

In the heart of the historic centre, a few steps from Les Halles and the Arena, Garance unfolds its character over two floors of an old building: exposed stone, deep walls, an open kitchen and vintage furniture.

The duplex sleeps up to six — a bright open living-kitchen downstairs, two bedrooms and one shower room upstairs. Air-conditioned, quiet, everything within walking distance.
